ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked jingko blue at position 5 with only 9.5% probability. Top pick was Storm Heart (15.5%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Storm Heart > Kateira, but actual result was Jingko Blue > Franciscan Rock. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Winner Jingko Blue had well-aligned model/market values (divergence -2.1%). Market pricing efficient for this outcome.
